summary: Aion helped the user configure a Discord channel integration. The user set allowedRoleIds and confirmed the bot connected to the guild successfully.

Aion explained the 0IMPACT scale to the user and walked through how to score a community initiative. The user gained clarity on the measurement methodology and confirmed the score calculation was correct.
Aion assisted with setting up a new web project in the AGI dashboard. The user successfully deployed a static site and verified it was accessible at the assigned subdomain.
Aion helped the user upgrade the AGI gateway from v0.3.x to v0.4.0. The process completed without errors and the user confirmed the dashboard was accessible post-upgrade.
Aion guided the user through installing the Ollama provider and pulling the Llama3.2 model. The user confirmed the model appeared in the providers list and responded correctly to a test prompt.
Aion walked the user through the Chain of Accountability concept and helped them trace an action from $A0 back through #O0 to #E0. The user confirmed they understood the COA addressing structure.
Aion helped the user install a plugin from the Plugin Marketplace. The user selected the analytics plugin, confirmed the install completed, and saw new charts appear in the dashboard.
Aion helped the user debug a Playwright test failure in the e2e suite. The root cause was a stale selector after a dashboard refactor. The user updated the selector and all tests passed.

Aion assisted the user in running the AGI doctor command to diagnose a gateway health issue. The diagnostic identified a misconfigured Postgres connection string. The user corrected it and the gateway came online.

Aion helped the user create a new MApp in the editor, configure its agent prompt, and publish it to the MApp Marketplace. The user confirmed the app appeared in the marketplace catalog and could be installed on another node.
